inputs.label: Total Energy Consumption (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Total electrical energy consumed by the facility over the reporting period (e.g., monthly).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total electrical energy consumed by the facility over the reporting period (e.g., monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tesisin raporlama dönemi boyunca (örneğin aylık) tükettiği toplam elektrik enerjisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte elektrische Energie, die von der Einrichtung im Berichtszeitraum (z. B. monatlich) verbraucht wurde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie électrique totale consommée par l'installation sur la période de rapport (ex. mensuelle).
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía eléctrica total consumida por la instalación durante el período de reporte (ej. mensual).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الطاقة الكهربائية المستهلكة من قبل المنشأة خلال فترة التقرير (مثل شهريًا).

inputs.label: Peak Demand (kW)
inputs.businessContext: Highest recorded power demand during the period; used for demand charge calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Highest recorded power demand during the period; used for demand charge calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem boyunca kaydedilen en yüksek güç talebi; talep ücreti hesaplamasında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höchste aufgezeichnete Leistungsnachfrage im Zeitraum; wird für die Berechnung der Leistungspreise verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Demande de puissance la plus élevée enregistrée pendant la période ; utilisée pour le calcul de la facturation de la demande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Mayor demanda de potencia registrada durante el período; se utiliza para el cálculo del cargo por demanda.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أعلى طاقة مسجلة خلال الفترة؛ تُستخدم لحساب رسوم الطلب.

inputs.label: Energy Rate ($/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost per kWh from utility bill (blended rate).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost per kWh from utility bill (blended rate).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura üzerinden kWh başına ortalama maliyet (karma oran).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten pro kWh aus der Stromrechnung (Mischpreis).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen par kWh selon la facture d'électricité (tarif mixte).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio por kWh según la factura de servicios públicos (tarifa combinada).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط التكلفة لكل كيلوواط ساعة من فاتورة المرافق (معدل مدمج).

inputs.label: Demand Charge ($/kW)
inputs.businessContext: Utility demand charge per kW of peak demand.

businessContext_i18n.en: Utility demand charge per kW of peak demand.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tepe talebin kW'ı başına uygulanan talep ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Leistungspreis des Versorgers pro kW Spitzenlast.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de demande du fournisseur d'électricité par kW de demande de pointe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo por demanda de la empresa de servicios públicos por kW de demanda máxima.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة الطلب من شركة المرافق لكل ك.واط من ذروة الطلب.

inputs.label: Total Production Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced in the period (e.g., pieces, kg, liters).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced in the period (e.g., pieces, kg, liters).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönemde üretilen birim sayısı (örneğin adet, kg, litre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der im Zeitraum produzierten Einheiten (z. B. Stück, kg, Liter).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités produites sur la période (ex. pièces, kg, litres).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades producidas en el período (ej. piezas, kg, litros).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الوحدات المنتجة في الفترة (مثل القطع، الكجم، اللترات).

inputs.label: Facility Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of facility for benchmarking and normalization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of facility for benchmarking and normalization.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kıyaslama ve normalleştirme için tesis türü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Art der Einrichtung für Benchmarking und Normierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type d'installation pour l'analyse comparative et la normalisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de instalación para referencia comparativa y normalización.

inputs.label: Include Renewable Energy Offset
inputs.businessContext: If true, subtracts renewable generation from total consumption for net cost calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, subtracts renewable generation from total consumption for net cost calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, net maliyet hesaplaması için yenilenebilir üretimi toplam tüketimden düşer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, wird die erzeugte erneuerbare Energie vom Gesamtverbrauch abgezogen, um die Nettokosten zu berechnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, soustrait la production renouvelable de la consommation totale pour le calcul du coût net.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, resta la generación renovable del consumo total para el cálculo del costo neto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطرح التوليد المتجدد من الاستهلاك الكلي لحساب التكلفة الصافية.

inputs.label: Renewable Energy Generated (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: On-site renewable generation (solar, wind) during the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: On-site renewable generation (solar, wind) during the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem boyunca sahada üretilen yenilenebilir enerji (güneş, rüzgar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Eigene erneuerbare Erzeugung (Solar, Wind) im betrachteten Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Production renouvelable sur site (solaire, éolien) pendant la période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Generación renovable in situ (solar, eólica) durante el período.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التوليد المتجدد في الموقع (شمسي، رياح) خلال الفترة.

rules.message: Renewable generation cannot exceed total energy consumption when offset is included.
Production units must be greater than zero for unit cost calculation.

thresholds.message: Energy intensity exceeds 5 kWh/unit. Investigate efficiency opportunities.
Peak-to-average demand ratio > 1.5. Consider demand management or load shifting.
Energy cost per unit exceeds $0.50. Review energy procurement or process efficiency.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
